revision.comment: Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1244986604|1244986604]] by [[Special:Contributions/MSGJ|MSGJ]] ([[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]). This appears to cause the "The JSON content is not valid GeoJSON+simplestyle." error message. More testing is needed.
1 revision imported: mass importing from wikipedia
Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]</noinclude>"
Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects I
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 8 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23460549766|manual triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
